blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,056 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 40.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 54".
